contract.description: WTP-DEMO-01: Water Treatment Plant Reference Model for PlantOS and Virtual Factory. Covers process monitoring, equipment health, water quality chain, energy and chemical consumption monitoring, cost KPIs, and quality traceability.

plant.name: Water Treatment Plant Demo 01
plant.description: Reference water treatment plant model with process monitoring, equipment health, water quality chain, energy and chemical consumption monitoring, cost KPIs, and quality traceability.

import_recommendation.reason: First import â€” validate before applying
import_recommendation.notes: New plant, 9 areas, 47 assets, ~91 signals. Expected all creates.

scenarios.name: Normal Operation
scenarios.description: Stable production, compliant outlet quality, normal cost.

scenarios.name: Raw Water Contamination Event
scenarios.description: Raw turbidity, COD, and ammonia increase sharply. Impact propagates through treatment chain â€” settled and filtered turbidity rise, outlet quality risk score increases.

scenarios.name: Algae Bloom Event
scenarios.description: Raw algae index and TOC increase. Chlorine demand rises, free chlorine residual drops, filter run times shorten.

scenarios.name: Filter Breakthrough
scenarios.description: Filtered turbidity rises above 1.0 NTU. Outlet turbidity risk increases, compliance status may fail.

scenarios.name: Chlorine Underdosing
scenarios.description: Chlorine dose and free chlorine residual drop below 0.2 mg/L. Outlet compliance status fails, disinfection compromised.

scenarios.name: Chemical Overdosing
scenarios.description: Coagulant and chlorine dosing rates increase above normal. Outlet quality remains acceptable but chemical cost per m3 rises significantly.

scenarios.name: Filter Clogging with Energy Impact
scenarios.description: Filter DP rises toward 80 kPa. Pumping energy increases, specific energy consumption rises, outlet turbidity risk grows.

scenarios.name: High Service Pump Trip
scenarios.description: HSP-101 trips unexpectedly. Outlet manifold pressure drops, HSP-102 attempts to compensate but total flow decreases.

dashboards.name: Plant Overview
dashboards.description: Production summary, outlet quality, cost KPI, active alarms

dashboards.name: Water Quality Chain
dashboards.description: Turbidity and pH tracking through treatment stages

alarm_recommendations.name: Outlet Turbidity High
alarm_recommendations.description: Outlet turbidity exceeds 1.0 NTU â€” compliance at risk

alarm_recommendations.name: Outlet Free Chlorine Low
alarm_recommendations.description: Outlet free chlorine below 0.2 mg/L â€” disinfection compromised

alarm_recommendations.name: Outlet Compliance Failure
alarm_recommendations.description: Outlet compliance status is false â€” immediate attention required
